mapper.sql: SELECT s.id, s.code, s.sc_id, s.member_id, s.saler_id, s.payment_date, s.total_num, s.total_gift_num, s.total_amount, s.description, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.approve_by, s.approve_time, s.status, s.settle_status FROM tbl_retail_out_sheet AS s

SELECT s.id, s.code, s.sc_id, s.member_id, s.saler_id, s.payment_date, s.total_num, s.total_gift_num, s.total_amount, s.description, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, s.approve_by, s.approve_time, s.status, s.refuse_reason, s.settle_status, d.id AS detail_id, bundle.main_product_id AS detail_main_product_id, d.product_id AS detail_product_id, d.sku_id AS detail_sku_id, sku.code AS detail_sku_code, sku.sale_property_text AS detail_sale_property_text, p.code AS detail_product_code, p.name AS detail_product_name, c.name AS detail_category_name, brand.name AS detail_brand_name, p.spec AS detail_spec, p.unit AS detail_unit, ps.stock_num AS detail_stock_num, main_product.name AS detail_main_product_name, d.order_num AS detail_order_num, d.ori_price AS detail_ori_price, d.tax_price AS detail_tax_price, d.discount_rate AS detail_discount_rate, d.is_gift AS detail_is_gift, d.tax_rate AS detail_tax_rate, d.description AS detail_description, d.order_no AS detail_order_no, d.settle_status AS detail_settle_status, d.tax_amount AS detail_tax_amount FROM tbl_retail_out_sheet AS s LEFT JOIN tbl_retail_out_sheet_detail AS d ON d.sheet_id = s.id LEFT JOIN tbl_retail_out_sheet_detail_bundle AS bundle ON bundle.sheet_id = s.id AND bundle.product_detail_id = d.id LEFT JOIN base_data_product AS p ON p.id = d.product_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_sku AS sku ON sku.id = d.sku_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_category AS c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_brand AS brand ON brand.id = p.brand_id LEFT JOIN tbl_product_stock AS ps ON ps.sku_id = d.sku_id AND ps.sc_id = s.sc_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product AS main_product ON main_product.id = bundle.main_product_id

SELECT s.id, s.id AS sku_id, g.id AS product_id, g.code, s.code AS sku_code, s.sale_property_text, g.name, c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, b.id AS brand_id, b.name AS brand_name, g.spec, g.unit, retail.price AS retail_price, ps.stock_num AS stock_num, g.sale_tax_rate, g.available FROM base_data_product AS g INNER JOIN base_data_product_sku AS s ON s.product_id = g.id INNER JOIN base_data_product_sku_retail AS retail ON retail.id = s.id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_category AS c ON c.id = g.category_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_brand AS b ON b.id = g.brand_id LEFT JOIN tbl_product_stock AS ps ON ps.sku_id = s.id AND ps.sc_id = #{scId} LEFT JOIN recursion_mapping AS rm ON rm.node_id = c.id and rm.node_type = 2
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.code, s.sc_id, s.member_id, s.saler_id, d.id AS detail_id, d.sheet_id AS detail_sheet_id, d.product_id AS detail_product_id, d.sku_id AS detail_sku_id, sku.code AS detail_sku_code, sku.sale_property_text AS detail_sale_property_text, p.code AS detail_product_code, p.name AS detail_product_name, c.name AS detail_category_name, brand.name AS detail_brand_name, p.spec AS detail_spec, p.unit AS detail_unit, ps.stock_num AS detail_stock_num, d.order_num AS detail_order_num, d.ori_price AS detail_ori_price, d.tax_price AS detail_tax_price, d.discount_rate AS detail_discount_rate, d.is_gift AS detail_is_gift, d.tax_rate AS detail_tax_rate, d.description AS detail_description, d.order_no AS detail_order_no, d.return_num AS detail_return_num FROM tbl_retail_out_sheet AS s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT l.id, d.sheet_id, d.product_id, d.sku_id, l.order_num, d.ori_price, d.tax_price, d.discount_rate, d.is_gift, d.tax_rate, d.description, d.order_no, l.return_num, l.order_no AS lot_order_no FROM tbl_retail_out_sheet_detail AS d INNER JOIN tbl_retail_out_sheet_detail_lot AS l ON l.detail_id = d.id AND l.order_num > l.return_num WHERE d.sheet_id = #{id} ) AS d ON d.sheet_id = s.id LEFT JOIN base_data_product AS p ON p.id = d.product_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_sku AS sku ON sku.id = d.sku_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_category AS c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_brand AS brand ON brand.id = p.brand_id LEFT JOIN tbl_product_stock AS ps ON ps.sku_id = d.sku_id AND ps.sc_id = s.sc_id WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.status = 3 order by d.order_no, d.lot_order_no

AND ( g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%') OR g.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%') OR s.id IN (SELECT sc.sku_id FROM base_data_product_sku_code sc WHERE sc.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%')) )
AND g.product_type = 1
AND g.available = TRUE AND s.available = TRUE
ORDER BY g.code

AND ( g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vo.condition}, '%') OR g.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vo.condition}, '%') OR s.id IN (SELECT sc.sku_id FROM base_data_product_sku_code sc WHERE sc.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vo.condition}, '%')) )
AND b.id = #{vo.brandId}
AND (c.id = #{vo.categoryId} OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.categoryId}, rm.path))
AND g.product_type = 1
AND g.available = TRUE AND s.available = TRUE
ORDER BY g.code
